snippets.snippet: The terrace offers a wonderful view of the lake.
The breakfast, location and services are excellent.

address.address1: Jl. Diponegoro Kampung Lot Kala Kec. Kebayakan, Takengon

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

minAge: Minimum age of guests is: 18 year(s).
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean, the environment is clean and comfortable like your own home 🤩 you can see the lake from the rooftop, highly recommended for a very affordable price ✨
comments.originalComment: kamarnya bersih, lingkungan bersih dan nyaman seperti rumah sendiri🤩kelihatan danau dari rooftop, untuk harga yang murah sangat recomended✨

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: 깨끗하고 일하는 분들 포함 주인분이 너무 좋으셨어요. 필요한것들 이야기 했을때 언제든 적극적으로 도와줬어요. 숙소 옥상의 부는 끝내줍니다!!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything is great, and we are about to go anywhere. All the photo spots are beautiful. The staff and the owner are very friendly.
comments.originalComment: Semuanya oke, dan dekat mau pergi kemana aja. Spot foto juga semuanya bagus. Staff dan pemilik juga sangat ramah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments:
Almost all Windows are not faced to outside building.

But, the breakfast, location and services are excellent.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The view really beautyfull on the roof

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: clean, comfortable, spacious the room is

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: No breakfast is available, you have to look around for Indonesian stalls with only local food. The first restaurant "Lemong" is 10 minutes walk away. Forget about a visit to Putri Pukes Cave (near the lake on a coastal road) a tourist trap with no interest whatsoever!
comments.reviewPositives:
Near the lake, a peaceful place, friendly staff (but no English spoken). A rooftop terrace with views of the lake. Free coffee or tea is available. 
Convenient location if you want to visit the archeological sites of Loyang Ujung Karang or Loyang Mendale, roughly 15 minutes walk away, if you are interested in 5000-year-old burials of Austronesian people...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is clean, comfortable, and safe.
comments.originalComment: Tempat nya bersih, nyaman dan aman

comments.reviewNegatives: The bathroom floor was always wet. Water did not run off.
comments.reviewPositives: I booked the large 2 bed room ( the cheapest). Mistake ! Don't get that room. It smells moldy. I upgraded to a room upstairs and had a good stay. It is a quiet location and they have a great rooftop.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Thank you very much Agus for your hospitality. I recommend backpackers to stay at this place, the staff is lovely and always ready to help you. I had a great time with them. See you soon 😊

comments.reviewComments: Juara banget sih hospitality nya ramahh, baik, informatif bangett untuk rekomendasi tempat2 bagus di takengon... Really-really recomended
